title: Obscuros Pixelmon
description: This pack contains Pixelmon Reforged, along with optimizations, quality of life mods, and resource packs. Join the Obscuros Server for content and features that go beyond the scope of singleplayer Pixelmon.
body:
![Obscuros Logo Small](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a4dd961fe6a5a204e3c458e420a5170cb457d72.png)

The Obscuros Pixelmon Modpack contains Pixelmon Reforged, along with optimizations, quality of life mods, and resource packs. For the official Pixelmon release, visit https://reforged.gg/.

Be sure to allocate at least 4 GB of RAM for a smooth experience. [Full guide here](https://obscuros.fandom.com/wiki/Installing_Pixelmon#Modrinth_Launcher).

For the best way to enjoy the Pokémon+Minecraft experience, join the Obscuros Server for content and features that go beyond the scope of singleplayer Pixelmon.

We offer a place where you can play any way you want. Whether that's casual survival style or adventure-like with challenges like in the games and unique grand cities and parks to explore, we have it all in one creative package with a lot of heart. We're constantly updating and maintaining our server experience.

🟢 Server IP: **mc.playobscuros.com**

🎮 Discord: https://discord.gg/HqwwFHK

## 🌟 Core Features:

- Friendly Community
- Frequent Updates
- Obscuros Form Pokémon [Unique Forms with different textures/stats/abilities/moves/sprites]
- 2000+ Custom Textured Pokémon - most of which can be obtained by catching in the wild or earned through custom gameplay features
- Quests with unique stories, engaging content, and exclusive rewards
- Research Camp Tasks [Complete tasks for the Professor to unlock valuable repeatable rewards and increase your rank for huge one-time rewards]
- Events & Contests [Pokémon Snap ║ Bug Catching Contest ║ Fishing Contest]
- Monthly Tournaments & Raids
- Custom Cities to explore, with Boss Trainers and unique features

## 🥊 Gauntlets:
Obscuros Gauntlets are repeatable and each have their own custom currency for unique and valuable rewards

- Mt. Battle [Battle through 100 increasingly challenging trainers]
- Battle Tower [Batle endlessly]
- Gym Leader Castle [Battle familiar NPC Gym Leaders and Elite Four]
- Rocket Castle [Take down Team Rocket]
- Battle Café [Battle the 3 Café Masters daily]
- Victory Road [Unlocked by ranking up in-game]

## ⭐️ Additional Features:

- Staff-Maintained Wiki: https://obscuros.fandom.com/wiki/Obscuros_Pixelmon_Wiki
- Player Gyms ║ Player Elite Four ║ NPC Gyms ║ [open applications]
- Defeat Gym Leaders twice to get exclusive Gym Custom Textured Pokémon
- EV Training Arenas  ║ Level Up ''Zen Garden'' Training Zone
- Pokémon Parks
- Pokédex Rewards
- Game Corner
- Treasure Hunts [Collect hidden treasures in the cities for Obscuros Form Pokémon & unique rewards]
- Sell Pokemon to Shopkeepers
- Buy Pokémon modifications with in-game money
- GTS ║ Wondertrade ║ Hunts ║ Ultra Space enabled
- Earnable in-game Ranks
- Unlockable Areas & /kits
- Resource World [for resource gathering]
- Aura effects for your Pokémon & Boosters
- Octillery's Vote Shop [exchange vote tokens for special goodies]
- Public Mines [/warp Mine ║ /warp Mine2 ║ /warp DimensionalMines]
- Daycare with Virtual Ranch Blocks [for better performance]
- All Ride Pokémon Enabled [no tokens required]
- Keep Inventory ║ Land & Chest Protection

![Obscuros Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c26db306bbf7b815c9e06152ad16b2dcf50d4cb_0.webp)
